Container.Name: Comet
Container.Overview: Comet is a self-hosted service for torrent/debrid search with configurable environment variables and support for SQLite or PostgreSQL backends.
Container.Requires: Default setup uses SQLite (single-container friendly). SQLite database file path defaults to `/app/data/comet.db` in the mapped Data Folder. To use PostgreSQL instead, change DATABASE_TYPE to `postgresql` and set DATABASE_URL for your database host/user/password/database. If you use an external .env for additional Comet options, add those variables in Unraid under "Add another Path, Port, Variable, Label or Device".

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the Comet web service (container listens on 8000).

Config.Name: Data Folder
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for Comet application data.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Database target. For SQLite, use a file path in the Data Folder. For PostgreSQL, use host:port/database credentials format.
